Admin_Portal_Core.description: Candidate profile view and review tabs.
Login page using 'Native-First' role selection for maximum stability.
CLI tool for staff password hashing.
General portal styling and login UI enhancements.

Admin_Backend.description: Calculates skill density and CEFR levels from exam results.
Secure endpoints for exam retrieval and submission.
MySQL definition including Stage 4 exam tables.

User_Portal_Core.description: Dynamic portal for General Knowledge and Language exams.
Trainee profile view with integrated 'Edit Profile' modal.

User_Backend.description: Endpoints for registration and secure profile merging.
Pydantic models with CID, Age (16-60), and Phone validation.

System_Documentation.description: Frontend UI and API mapping guide.

Super_Admin_AI_Proxy.description: Isolated startup utility for the Super Admin ecosystem.
FastAPI entry point. Serves the dashboard at root and orchestrates AI service requests.
Active proxy for forwarding payloads to AI microservices (Ports 2341-2345).
Role-based authentication for Super Admin access.
Reference DDL for AI-specific tables (attendance, cohorts, etc.).
Integrated AI Control Center dashboard (Glassmorphism design).
Dynamic dispatcher logic and service health monitoring.

AI_Microservices_Registry.description: Documentation for the National ID OCR verification service.

Standardized_Exams.description: Arabic language exam with linguistic pillars.
English language exam with CEFR mapping.
